# services.angrr

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.angrr`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.angrr.configFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path to the angrr configuration file in TOML format. If not set, the configuration generated from {option}`services.angrr.settings` will be used. If specified, {option}`services.angrr.settings` will be ignored. |
| `services.angrr.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable angrr. |
| `services.angrr.enableNixGcIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable nix-gc.service integration. |
| `services.angrr.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Extra command-line arguments pass to angrr. |
| `services.angrr.logLevel` | `one of "off", "error", "warn", "info", "debug", "trace"` | Set the log level of angrr. |
| `services.angrr.package` | `package` | The angrr package to use. |
| `services.angrr.settings` | `open submodule of (TOML value)` | Global configuration for angrr in TOML format. |
| `services.angrr.settings.owned-only` | `one of "auto", "true", "false"` | Only monitors owned symbolic link target of GC roots. - "auto": behaves like true for normal users, false for root. - "true": only monitor GC roots owned by the current user. - "false": monitor all GC roots. |
| `services.angrr.settings.profile-policies` | `attribute set of (open submodule of (TOML value))` | Profile GC root policies. |
| `services.angrr.settings.profile-policies.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable this angrr policy. |
| `services.angrr.settings.profile-policies.<name>.keep-booted-system` | `boolean` | Whether to keep the last booted system generation. Only useful for system profiles. |
| `services.angrr.settings.profile-policies.<name>.keep-current-system` | `boolean` | Whether to keep the current system generation. Only useful for system profiles. |
| `services.angrr.settings.profile-policies.<name>.keep-latest-n` | `null or signed integer` | Keep the latest N GC roots in this profile. |
| `services.angrr.settings.profile-policies.<name>.keep-since` | `null or string` | Retention period for the GC roots in this profile. |
| `services.angrr.settings.profile-policies.<name>.profile-paths` | `list of string` | Paths to the Nix profile. When angrr runs in owned-only mode, and the option begins with `~`, it will be expanded to the home directory of the current user. When angrr does not run in owned-only mode, and the option begins with `~`, it will be expanded to the home of all users discovered respectively. |
| `services.angrr.settings.temporary-root-policies` | `attribute set of (open submodule of (TOML value))` | Policies for temporary GC roots(e.g. result and direnv). |
| `services.angrr.settings.temporary-root-policies.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable this angrr policy. |
| `services.angrr.settings.temporary-root-policies.<name>.filter` | `null or (open submodule of (TOML value))` | External filter program to further filter GC roots matched by this policy. |
| `services.angrr.settings.temporary-root-policies.<name>.filter.arguments` | `list of string` | Extra command-line arguments pass to the external filter program. |
| `services.angrr.settings.temporary-root-policies.<name>.filter.program` | `string` | Path to the external filter program. |
| `services.angrr.settings.temporary-root-policies.<name>.ignore-prefixes` | `null or (list of string)` | List of path prefixes to ignore. If null is specified, angrr builtin settings will be used. |
| `services.angrr.settings.temporary-root-policies.<name>.ignore-prefixes-in-home` | `null or (list of string)` | Path prefixes to ignore under home directory. If null is specified, angrr builtin settings will be used. |
| `services.angrr.settings.temporary-root-policies.<name>.path-regex` | `string` | Regex pattern to match the GC root path. |
| `services.angrr.settings.temporary-root-policies.<name>.period` | `null or string` | Retention period for the GC roots matched by this policy. |
| `services.angrr.settings.temporary-root-policies.<name>.priority` | `signed integer` | Priority of this policy. Lower number means higher priority, if multiple policies monitor the same path, the one with higher priority will be applied. |
| `services.angrr.settings.touch.project-globs` | `list of string` | List of glob patterns to include or exclude files when touching GC roots. Only applied when `angrr touch` is invoked with the `--project` flag. Patterns use an inverted gitignore-style semantics. See <https://docs.rs/ignore/latest/ignore/overrides/struct.OverrideBuilder.html#method.add>. |
| `services.angrr.timer.dates` | `string` | How often or when the retention policy is performed. |
| `services.angrr.timer.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable angrr timer. |
